text: Eating a hot dog with a fork and knife at a restaurant
Replying 'you too' when the waiter said 'enjoy your meal'
Using speakerphone in public with the volume at full
Taking the last slice of pizza without asking if anyone else wanted it
Putting the milk in before the cereal
Leaving exactly one square of toilet paper on the roll and not replacing it
Accidentally replying all to a 200-person company email with 'Thanks!'
Texting 'I'm almost there' when still 40 minutes away
Double-dipping at a party after being told once already
Checking their phone — at full brightness — during a film at the cinema
Ordering pineapple on a shared pizza without consulting the group
Responding to a long heartfelt message with simply 'K'
Forwarding a chain email to the entire family group chat in 2024
Pronouncing GIF as 'JIF' and defending it aggressively
Using the last of the office water filter and not refilling it for six weeks
Microwaving fish in the shared office kitchen at 8:45am
Parking diagonally across two spaces in a full car park
Posting major spoilers for a show on social media the hour it dropped
Contaminating the recycling bin with items that obviously do not belong
Chewing with their mouth open during an otherwise silent meeting
Ghosting someone after the fifth date without any explanation
Finishing the milk, putting the empty carton back in the fridge, and saying nothing
Faking a prior engagement to get out of a social event they had already confirmed
Presenting a colleague's idea in a meeting as their own and accepting the praise
Leaving a voicemail that consists entirely of 'Hey, it's me — give me a call'
Reading their flatmate's diary 'by accident' and then referencing it in conversation
Calling in sick to work and then being spotted at a large public concert
Borrowing someone's phone charger and returning it at 3%
Breaking a glass at someone's house party and hiding the evidence under the sofa
Sending a text that is just '?' with no prior context at 2am
Eating a clearly labelled colleague's lunch from the office fridge
Using a friend's streaming account for 18 months without ever offering to contribute
Taking the neighbour's newspaper from their doorstep 'just to have a quick look'
Pretending to be asleep when a housemate needed urgent help moving furniture
Leaving the bathroom without washing their hands and then shaking everyone's hands at a dinner party
Calling a colleague by the wrong name for three months despite being corrected twice
Jumping a 45-minute queue by pretending to join a friend 'who was already waiting'
Keeping a tenant's full deposit over a single light scuff on a skirting board
Setting six separate alarms from 6am in a shared hotel room and snoozing every one
Ending a call by saying 'okay love you bye' to their bank's customer service line and not acknowledging it
